text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and Smart Falcon and I decide to
visit a shrine together. However, she seems
different from her normal self...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Mumble, mumble. Mumble, mumble, mumble, mumble...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, was I speaking out loud?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's no good... wishes don't come true if you
say them out loud. Anyway, come on, Trainer! Put
your hands together and get praying!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Murmur, murmur.

Sneaking a sideways glance at her as she prays
earnestly, I feel her extraordinary amount of
determination.

Struck by her earnestness, I decide that my own
prayer should be for...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All righty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All righty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All righty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've prayed, there's something else I'd
like to take care of.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We need to talk about plans for this year—my
senior year.

I already have a rough outline of how we should
approach senior year.
choice_data_list:
Let's stay the course and keep putting out
results.

text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has been outstanding in her classic
year. I tell her that the plan is to win the February
Stakes and proceed slow and steady through her
senior year.
However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but that's not gonna cut it. If I just "stay
the course" and go "slow and steady," it won't be
enough!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If we just stick to the same pace, I won't be able
to reach new heights.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take first in every one of my
senior-year goal races!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And not just races that I can comfortably win. I'm
talking about winning G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
First the February Stakes. Then the Teio Sho, the
JBC Classic, the Champions Cup...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And finally, the Tokyo Daishoten at the end of
the year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna announce my intent to win all of them!

The races she mentions are all ones I was planning
to enter her in, and of course, no matter the race,
we should always aim for the top spot. But even
so...
choice_data_list:
Why do you want to announce that to
everyone?

text_block_list.text:
In the past, Smart Falcon's main focus has been
on taking center stage at winning concerts—not
on victory for its own sake. If that's changed,
there has to be a reason.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Because I want everyone to know that there's an
Umadol out there who's crazy fast on dirt!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've been trying to make dirt racing
more popular by just doing what I normally do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's how we reached the hype we saw at last
year's Tokyo Daishoten. But it's not going to get
us any further.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I really want to aim for the top—to give a
performance that can even match the Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have to get more and more attention! I have to
become more and more amazing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like—I know! I have to be like the "otherworldly"
Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow... She's so amazing. I'm gonna be just like
her!

Come to think of it, Smart Falcon has always seen
something of her own ideal Umadol in Silence
Suzuka.

The path she forges all by herself... Her
overwhelming speed that captures everyone's
attention... They've always been a beacon for
Falcon to aspire to.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll soar to a level beyond "turf racing" or "dirt
racing," and become everyone's number one!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need you to be prepared as well, Trainer.
Prepared to walk the treacherous road ahead of
us...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And reach the top together! Let's take the world
by storm!

If she goes ahead with proclaiming her intention
to win all those highly competitive G1 races,
there will be no turning back.

However, since the day I chose to share her
dream of becoming a top Umadol by running on
dirt... my conviction has never faltered!
choice_data_list: Let's take the world by storm!
Let's take the world by storm!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
First place for every race! Let's make this
resolution a reality!
